veg.name: Oats with Nuts and Berries
steps: Boil oats in almond milk for 5 min
veg.clinical_note: Low glycemic index. Cinnamon helps regulate blood sugar.

veg.name: Vegetable Upma
steps: Saute mustard seeds and vegetables in oil
Add water and semolina, cook 5 min
veg.clinical_note: Rich in fiber. Turmeric has anti-inflammatory benefits.

veg.name: Moong Dal Chilla
steps: Blend soaked dal with ginger and chilli
Pour batter on pan, cook both sides 3 min each
veg.clinical_note: High protein vegetarian option. Excellent for blood sugar management.

non_veg.name: Egg White Vegetable Omelette
steps: Pour egg whites, fold when set
non_veg.clinical_note: High protein, low fat. Ideal for diabetic patients.

non_veg.name: Boiled Eggs with Whole Grain Toast
steps: Mash avocado with lemon and pepper
Serve eggs on toast with avocado
non_veg.clinical_note: Balanced macros. Healthy fats support heart health.

veg.name: Palak Paneer with Brown Rice
steps: Saute onion garlic, add tomato and spices
Add paneer and spinach puree, cook 5 min
veg.clinical_note: Iron-rich spinach with protein-rich paneer. Low sodium version.

veg.name: Dal Tadka with Roti
steps: Saute onion, tomato, spices for tadka
veg.clinical_note: High fiber lentils control blood sugar. Whole wheat roti provides sustained energy.

veg.name: Rajma Chawal
steps: Mix rajma in masala, simmer 10 min
veg.clinical_note: Kidney beans are excellent for blood sugar control. Rich in plant protein.

non_veg.name: Grilled Chicken with Quinoa Salad
steps: Marinate chicken with herbs and lemon
Toss quinoa with vegetables and olive oil
non_veg.clinical_note: Lean protein with complete amino acids. Quinoa has low glycemic index.

non_veg.name: Tuna Rice Bowl
steps: Assemble bowl with rice, cucumber, avocado
Top with sesame seeds and lemon

veg.name: Mixed Vegetable Khichdi
steps: Pressure cook with vegetables, turmeric, cumin for 3 whistles
veg.clinical_note: Easy to digest. Ideal light dinner for diabetic patients.

veg.name: Paneer Tikka with Salad
steps: Marinate paneer in yogurt and spices 30 min
Grill or bake at 200C for 15 min
veg.clinical_note: High protein, low carb dinner. Good for weight management.

non_veg.name: Baked Salmon with Vegetables
steps: Place salmon and vegetables on baking tray
Dress with olive oil, lemon, garlic, herbs
non_veg.clinical_note: Rich in omega-3. Excellent for heart and blood pressure management.

veg.name: Roasted Makhana
steps: Add makhana, roast on low heat 5 min
veg.clinical_note: Low calorie. High in antioxidants. Good blood sugar management.

veg.name: Fruit and Nut Mix
veg.clinical_note: Walnuts provide omega-3. Apple fiber slows sugar absorption.

non_veg.name: Boiled Eggs with Cucumber
steps: Season eggs with pepper and lemon
non_veg.clinical_note: High protein snack. Keeps hunger at bay between meals.

low_impact.name: Chair Yoga
low_impact.clinical_note: Safe for knee pain. Improves flexibility and reduces stress.

low_impact.name: Brisk Walking
steps: Brisk walk at 5 km/h for 20 min
low_impact.clinical_note: Best exercise for diabetics. Improves insulin sensitivity.

low_impact.name: Swimming
low_impact.clinical_note: Zero impact on joints. Excellent for knee pain patients.

low_impact.name: Standing Balance Exercises
low_impact.clinical_note: Improves balance and stability. Safe for knee pain.

moderate.name: Cycling (Stationary)
moderate.clinical_note: Low joint stress. Excellent cardiovascular workout.

moderate.name: Yoga (Gentle Flow)
moderate.clinical_note: Reduces blood pressure and cortisol. Excellent for hypertension.

wellness.tip: Aim for 7-8 hours of sleep. Poor sleep raises blood sugar and blood pressure.
actions: Sleep and wake at the same time daily

wellness.tip: Chronic stress raises cortisol which directly increases blood sugar levels.
actions: Practice deep breathing for 5 min daily
Try 10 min meditation using any app
Take short walks during work breaks
Talk to someone you trust regularly

wellness.tip: Drink at least 2.5 liters of water daily. Dehydration worsens blood sugar control.
actions: Start day with 1 glass of warm water
Carry a water bottle at all times
Eat water-rich fruits like cucumber and watermelon
Limit sugary drinks and alcohol completely

wellness.tip: Monitor blood sugar regularly and log patterns to identify triggers.
actions: Log meals and glucose readings together

Hi there! Ready to support your health journey. Ask me about your meals, exercise, or wellness tips!
